About Us:
The beginnings of BRANDS take us back to the year where men's fashion in Arab countries has just started to bloom. BRANDS emerged solely in focusing fashion collection for men.
Being in the retail industry for 15 years, BRANDS was able to manage to be on top by keeping up with the latest trend and coming up with innovations in fashion. Aiming to be always above and beyond, it is essential to understand customer's needs and preferences and to study buying behavior so we may be able to meet the demands of our diverse clientele.
BRANDS is performing quite well as evident in the continuous expansion across the Middle East. Since we started our operation in 2004, the group has now grown to 15 stores in the gulf. We consistently acquire international concepts to add to our impressive portfolio.
As Brands progresses, we uphold our commitment to providing the excellent customer service. We strive to create an environment where customers can enjoy a luxurious shopping experience and an ensemble of style that is a cut above the rest.

Burger Pit is a quintessentially classic American Airstream brought into the modern world. Drawing inspiration from the retro 1950’s, it combines old-fashioned values with Dubai’s ever-growing demand for good food, fast.
The motto is simple – good quality food done well. Classic beef burgers sit alongside new favourites like crispy fried buttermilk chicken (The Drifter) and The Original, while for the less decisive, there’s the option of having all of it in the aptly named ‘The Argentinian’ burger. As well as this, our gourmet food truck also boasts classic hot dogs in the shape of their ‘Home Dog’ – premium sausage in a soft bun with caramelised onions and American Mustard
And not forgetting your classic all-American shakes are there to wash it all down.
A first-of-its-kind concept in Dubai, Burger Pit will appeal to every demographic with its quality ingredients, accessibility, and superior flavour. The ultimate convenience food

Directly connected to the Dubai Festival City Mall home to 500 retail stores, restaurants and kids/family entertainment, Holiday Inn - Dubai Festival City is a 4-star property perfect for families with its Family Suites. Guests can enjoy free Wifi throughout the hotel.
All rooms in the hotel are fitted with a kettle. Rooms are complete with a private bathroom equipped with a bath, while selected rooms have a seating area. At Holiday Inn - Dubai Festival City, rooms come with air conditioning and a flat-screen TV.
A buffet breakfast is served each morning at the property. Children eat for free with one paying adult. Speaking Arabic, English and Hindi, staff will be happy to provide guests with practical guidance on the area at the reception.
Guest can enjoy "Imagine Show", a record breaking attraction. Boasting the largest water screen projection and largest permanent projection mapping in the world – both a Guinness World Records breaker, it features the latest entertainment technology in water, pyrotechnics, lasers, lights and dramatic effects.
IKEA is within walking distance to the hotel. The nearest airport is Dubai International Airport, 3 km from Holiday Inn - Dubai Festival City.

About us:
WHAT IS THE MAKERSPACE?
A playground for creativity, the makerspace is an open-access DIY workshop and fabrication studio. We are a community-based space where entrepreneurs, artists, makers, teachers, and students come together to learn and work. The makerspace is the ideal place to build almost anything you can imagine. Our workshop provides access to an unbelievable set of high quality machines and tools – plus, all the training you need to use the equipment and build new skills.
HOW DOES IT WORK?
It‘s simple! Anyone can become a member and may attend classes. The makerspace offers over 40 in-depth classes that are taught by our highly trained experts in their field.
Our memberships give you unlimited access to reserve and use the makerspace’s tools upon successful completion of equipment-specific Safety and Basic Use (SBU) classes.
Experienced and approachable staff are available full time to help you develop ideas and improve technical skills. Whatever your background or skill sets, come in and prepare to be inspired!

- The parent should fill up Playhouse Registration and Medical Form with all necessary information.
- Requested documents for each child file are:
- • Copy of Passport, Residence Visa & Emirates ID of the Sponsoring Parents
- • Copy of Passport, Residence Visa & Emirates ID of the Child
- • Copy of the Child Immunization Record / Vaccination Card of the Child
- • Copy of Birth Certificate of the Child
- • 2 Passport Size Photos of the Child
- • Signed Playhouse Policies, Terms and Conditions

- PLAYHOUSE prefers the parents to provide all necessary information about the child that can help to the supervisors and assistants in the beginning so the child can feel comfortable with our employee and nicely settled into the nursery environment.

- Attendance Policy

- It's always preferable that children attend the nursery on a regular basis. NO REFUNDS / NO FREEZING are made for any missed days (sickness, vacation, holiday, leaving the country, etc.). If child is absent, parents should inform the nursery. If a parent feels the need to remove their child from the nursery, they should give a two-week written notice in order the vacancy to be filled.

- Fee Policy

- Paid fees are not refundable or transferable in any case. No reductions will be given in case of absence, illness, vacation, holiday or unforeseen closures. Payment can be done by cash, credit card or cheque. Fee invoices will be sent to the parents at the beginning of each term and needs to be paid in full within a week. If fees remain unpaid by the end of the second week of the trimester, the child will no longer be admitted to attend until accounts are settled.

- Do not send a child who has these common signs or symptoms of illnesses:
- • Fever
- • Sore Throat
- • Persistent cough or sneezing
- • Runny Nose
- • Vomiting or Diarrhea in the past 24 hours
- • Ear Infection
- • Rashes
- • Eye Infection
- • Head Lice
- • Chicken Pox
- If your child has been prescribed antibiotics, may return back to class 24 hours after the first dosage.

Started in 1989 in Dubai, Pure Gold Jewellers is now one of the fastest growing jewellery brands with 150 stores in nine countries.

Located in one of Dubai’s most vibrant and spectacular neighborhoods, Rove Dubai Marina is the perfect destination for leisure travelers. Surrounded by stunning high-rise buildings as well as a wide variety of shopping and dining outlets including Dubai Marina Mall, the hotel is nearby the beach and barely a few minutes driving distance from The Palm. Downtown Dubai and The Dubai Mall are just 20 minutes away. Business hotspots including Dubai Media City, Dubai Internet City and Jebel Ali Freezone are also within close proximity.
All guest rooms in the hotel are fitted with a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Rooms are complete with a modern bathroom including power rain showers and hairdryer; a sofa bed suitable for a child, desk and coffee/tea making facilities. There is a free ice machine on every room floor.

Rove Dubai Marina offers an outdoor pool. Dubai Marina Mall is 2 km from the accommodation. The nearest airport is Al Maktoum International Airport, 21 km from Rove Dubai Marina. The property offers a daily shuttle from the Hotel to JBR Beach, Marina Mall and JLT Metro Station every 2 hours starting from 9 am till 9 pm.Dubai Marina is a great choice for travelers interested in beach walks, beaches and restaurants.

About us:
Shangri-La Hotel, Dubai provides guests a luxurious accommodation, exceptional dining, and distinctive hospitality in the heart of this dynamic city. Located on Sheikh Zayed Road, the 42-storey hotel is a 15-minute drive from Dubai International Airport and only 5 minutes from the Dubai Convention Centre and World Trade Centre. The hotel sits opposite Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC) and the Burj Khalifa, within close proximity to The Dubai Mall as well as Dubai City Walk, and Dubai’s popular beaches. A combination of traditional luxury with modern amenities, each room offers extraordinary views from a sophisticated setting.

Enticing global flavors spoil visitors for choice across eight restaurants and lounges. Embark on a culinary journey with inspirational gastronomy from Vietnam, China and the Middle East. Experienced teams deliver an authentic experience through the food and culture of each restaurant. Shangri-La’s world-renowned service ensures a memorable meal for each and every guest.

Whether you are seeking rest and relaxation or sports and recreation, Shangri-La Hotel, Dubai, has the facilities and services to ensure total satisfaction. Relax and rejuvenate in the tranquil waters of the swimming pool, or take a breath and unwind at CHI, The Spa at Shangri-La.

Shangri-La Hotel, Dubai is the perfect choice for large functions and smaller, intimate gatherings.
